name: favorite-widget
description: Windows desktop favorite widget MVP in C++/Win32

scripts.check: npm run configure && npm run build
scripts.installer: npm run configure && npm run build && cpack --config build/CPackConfig.cmake -G NSIS64 -B dist
scripts.package: npm run configure && npm run build && cpack --config build/CPackConfig.cmake -B dist
scripts.start: npm run configure && npm run build && .\build\favorite_widget.exe
scripts.smoke: npm run configure && npm run build && .\build\favorite_widget.exe --smoke-test
